questions.question: Time to build prefix sum array of size n?
After building, how fast for a subarray query?
Total time for k range queries using prefix sums?
questions.explanation: Build O(n), each query O(1): O(n+k).

questions.question: If all elements negative, does prefix-sum still work?
questions.explanation: Prefix sums handle negatives just fine.

questions.question: Can prefix sums extend to 2D? Query time?
questions.explanation: Yes - 2D prefix grid: O(1) for sub-rectangle.
